# Title

- Getting Started [Step By Step - Creating your first transaction](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-558483.md): 
- Getting Started [Step By Step - Creating VAT / Global Tax Transaction](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-559067.md): 
- Endpoints > Authentication [Authentication - Getting Started](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-550428.md): 
- Endpoints > Customers [Get to Know](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-556063.md): 
- Endpoints > Exemptions [Get to Know](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-556085.md): 
- Endpoints > Transactions [Get to Know](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-556104.md): 
- Endpoints > Transactions [The Importance of Shipping Address](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-556105.md): 
- Endpoints > Transactions [How to Use Credit Memos](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-844508.md): 
- Endpoints > Address Validation [Address Validation Intro](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-824413.md): 
- Special Features [Global Tax Rate](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-558391.md): 
- Special Features [Partial Address](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-558390.md): 
- Special Features [Discounts](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-558392.md): 
- Special Features [Inclusive Tax](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-558450.md): 
- Special Features [Vat Validation](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-839214.md): 
- Applications [Xero - Integration & User Manual](https://docs.complyt.io/doc-1207051.md): 

## API Docs
- Endpoints > Authentication [Create JWT](https://docs.complyt.io/api-8041522.md): 
- Endpoints > Customers [Get Customer](https://docs.complyt.io/api-7838830.md): Get Customer by External ID and Source
- Endpoints > Customers [Get All Customers](https://docs.complyt.io/api-7838832.md): Get all Customers
- Endpoints > Customers [Upsert Customer](https://docs.complyt.io/api-7838831.md): Update or Insert Customer by External ID and source
- Endpoints > Customers [Update Customer](https://docs.complyt.io/api-7838835.md): Patch Customer by  Complyt Id
- Endpoints > Exemptions [Get All Exemptions](https://docs.complyt.io/api-8021450.md): 
- Endpoints > Exemptions [Post Exemption](https://docs.complyt.io/api-8021452.md): 
- Endpoints > Exemptions [Update Exemption](https://docs.complyt.io/api-8021453.md): 
- Endpoints > Exemptions [Patch Exemption](https://docs.complyt.io/api-8021454.md): 
- Endpoints > Transactions [Get Transaction (thin)](https://docs.complyt.io/api-12694340.md): Get Transaction by External ID and Source.
- Endpoints > Transactions [Get Transaction](https://docs.complyt.io/api-7838824.md): Get Transaction by External ID and Source.
- Endpoints > Transactions [Upsert Transaction](https://docs.complyt.io/api-7838825.md): Update or Insert Transaction by External ID and source
- Endpoints > Transactions [Delete Transaction](https://docs.complyt.io/api-7838826.md): 
- Endpoints > Transactions [Get All Transactions (thin)](https://docs.complyt.io/api-12694354.md): Returns a list of transactions.
- Endpoints > Transactions [Get All Transactions](https://docs.complyt.io/api-7838827.md): Returns a list of transactions.
- Endpoints > Transactions [Upsert VAT / GT Transactio](https://docs.complyt.io/api-8103808.md): Update or Insert Transaction by External ID and source
- Endpoints > Address Validation [Validate Address](https://docs.complyt.io/api-13481178.md): The Validate Address endpoint returns valid address suggestions based on the provided input address.
- Endpoints > Sales Tax Rates [Get Sales Tax Rates](https://docs.complyt.io/api-13715757.md): The Sales Tax Rates endpoint returns a rate based on the provided input address. Currently, the endpoint supports addresses within the United States only.
- Endpoints > Vat Validation [Validate Vat](https://docs.complyt.io/api-13850084.md): 
- Special Features [Post exemptions from CSV](https://docs.complyt.io/api-13490438.md): This endpoint processes a CSV file for creating exemptions. The uploaded CSV file is validated for required columns, and exemptions are created for valid data. It provides a detailed response with success, errors, and skipped data.

## Schemas
- Schemas [Item Response](https://docs.complyt.io/schema-2583628.md): 
- Schemas [Item Request](https://docs.complyt.io/schema-2589684.md):

- Schemas [SalesTaxRates](https://docs.complyt.io/schema-2332065.md): 
- Schemas [SubJurisdictionalTaxRules](https://docs.complyt.io/schema-2332067.md):
